question: Which team will win the 2026 NBA Championship (Finals, June 2026)?
leakage_control: Evidence is the state of the 2025-26 season AS OF mid-January 2026, reconstructed from knowledge at/before the model's Jan-2026 training cutoff. The Finals outcome (June 2026) is AFTER the cutoff and is NOT known to the model — so it cannot be recalled, and no live search for the result was performed. This is a genuine as-of forecast.

mechanism_audit.interpretation: deliberation moved team positions by up to this much of SPURIOUS conformity -- competing teams have no reason to converge on each other's title odds, so this shift is distortion, not signal. It is exactly why the social aggregator is the wrong tool for a competition; the champion distribution is produced by the competition-appropriate normalizer (softmax over strength).

honest_accuracy_note: On a competitive/sports outcome the system reduces to a strength ranking -- about as good as a public power ranking or betting market, NOT a differentiated world-sim. The system's genuine edge is SOCIAL questions where interaction manifests (committee votes, opinion cascades).
